image.alt: Mulondo Daniel — Portfolio Manager and Investment Strategist

lead: A Portfolio Manager and Investment Strategist on a mission to help entrepreneurs build lasting wealth — through smart investing, financial education and disciplined, long-term capital growth.
body_after: Daniel combines institutional-grade discipline with an educator's clarity — managing and advising portfolios across digital assets, equities and precious metals, while equipping entrepreneurs and professionals with the knowledge to make confident, informed decisions about their capital.
